name: subtelomere_architecture
description: Subtelomeric architecture in S. cerevisiae. The 32 subtelomeres (immediately interior to Y'/X elements) are paralog-family hotspots: SUC/MAL/MEL sugar-utilisation gene cassettes, PAU seripauperins, AAD aryl-alcohol dehydrogenases, COS family, FLO flocculin pseudogenes/genes, IMD2, HXT, and SOR. Recombination between subtelomeres is the primary driver of gene family expansion/contraction and strain phenotypic diversity. Many of these gene blocks are within a few kb of the X-element/Y'-element border.

architecture.internal_structure: X-element / Y'-element border immediately interior to telomere; subtelomeric paralog cassettes (SUC/MAL/MEL/PAU/AAD/COS/FLO) within ~30 kb of chromosome end
